headline: Agriculture Biotechnology Industry Research and Global Forecast Report 2025-2030, Profiles of Prominent Players - Bayer, Corteva Agriscience, BASF, Syngenta, Zoetis, Elanco Animal Health, Novonesis
summary: The agriculture biotechnology market, valued at an estimated USD 92.19 billion in 2025, is projected to reach USD 144.25 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 9.4%. This growth is spurred by global food demands, decreasing arable land, and the pursuit of sustainable farming. Key drivers include genetically modified (GM) crops and microbial innovations aimed at boosting crop yields and minimizing environmental impact. The plant biotechnology sector is expected to dominate, fueled by the adoption
